column33: For first game decided to go Thrones Favor, but it seemed too slow, and Bridge builder on bridge got to 20+ with mountain of shards. It was a problem, and Yondu was a solution. In second game Hand 1 went Black Widow/ karnak (with lots of sending undercover) and hand 2 was sniping henchmen with Yondu.
I though Karnak and Gorgon would do better together, but at least Black Widow and Falcon helped getting VP quite a lot. Though setup.

column33: Hit Lilith more times than I thought I would

Absolutely brutal combo! The fact that Lilith and that scheme didn't come in the same expansion is mind boggling. First game went so poorly with Hiroim and Glad Hulk not being able to recruit and thus stalling the Wakanda deck. Second game was a little better. Adding Shuri to get some HQ shuffle was a good idea. Ultimately though, the hero to be was Hiroim. His transformed card to power up on bystanders was the key to hitting Lilith after the first couple twists. Though game, never wanna try it again.

column33: I liked Mr. Fantastic and Invisible Woman, but I was out of other heroes with Tech classes, so was left with a choice of either Deadpool or Captain America.
